# hooks-public-submit-org-invite-code

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for submitOrgInviteCode

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useSubmitOrgInviteCodeMutation(); mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```

## Examples

### Use useSubmitOrgInviteCodeMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useSubmitOrgInviteCodeMutation();
mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```
